name: Reshape and Remold
reqs: gilded_path_scrapsinger, refine_and_reuse, artisans_blade, songs_unforged, masterwork => reshape_and_remold := 70s MTL
additional_info: Increases the armor drain effect of your rods by 25%, from 2% drain to 2.5%.
desc: Successful procs of Scrapsinger will increase the amount of armor damage your opponent takes. After hitting 10 stacks, the opponent will take +5% damage until the stacks drop below 10.
